title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 08 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 08 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 08 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 08/12/2025
Iron ore experienced a weak and vola le trend today, with the main contract I2605 closing at 760.5, down by 1.43% compared to the previous trading day.Traders adjusted their shipments according to market condi ons, while steel mills remained cau ous and took a wait-and-see approach, showing limited purchasing interest. In the Shandong region, the transac on price for PB fines ranged between 780-785 yuan, down by 0-5 yuan per ton from last Friday. In the Hebei region, the transac on price for PB fines ranged between 790-795 yuan per ton, also down by 0-5 yuan per ton from last Friday.
